# Burqan Formation

**Summary**: A sedimentary formation in the Midyan Basin.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-butt|Butt, 2018]] studied the Nutaysh member of the Burqan Formation.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2018-butt|Butt, 2018]] submarine fan system

## Reservoir Properties



## Diagenetic History

- [[2018-butt|Butt, 2018]] pre-compaction calcite, Fe-dolomite, and dolomite cementation

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Nutaysh member is a submarine fan system with average visual porosity of 8-22%. ([[2018-butt|Butt, 2018, p. 24]])
